entities.name: HELIOCHEILUS ALBIPUNCTELLA
entities.description: Major insect pest of pearl millet in the Sahel, also known as the millet head miner

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The agricultural crop targeted by the millet head miner

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: The geographical region where the study was conducted and the pest is prevalent

entities.name: HABROBRACON HEBETOR
entities.description: A native parasitoid used for the biological control of Heliocheilus albipunctella

entities.name: AUGMENTATIVE BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The practice of releasing parasitoids to manage pest populations

entities.name: PANICLE EMERGENCE STAGE
entities.description: A specific growth stage of pearl millet used to determine the timing of parasitoid release

entities.name: PEST OCCURRENCE
entities.description: The timing of the first appearance of pest eggs used as a reference for parasitoid release

entities.name: PARASITISM
entities.description: The biological interaction where the parasitoid Habrobracon hebetor attacks the larvae of Heliocheilus albipunctella
